Resource definitions for PRF with 'common' overrides, including PNG media details.

# Purpose
This JSON file defines resource metadata for media assets, specifically images, used in the PRF and 'common' overrides. It includes a list of media items, each with a `type` indicating the format (e.g., `png`), a `name` serving as an identifier (e.g., `TEST_IMAGE_PINWHEEL`), and a `file` path specifying the location of the image file within the project directory.
